args.command: which hping3 || echo 'hping3:notfound'; iptables -C OUTPUT -p icmp --icmp-type echo-request -m limit --limit 5/second --limit-burst 10 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp --icmp-type echo-request -m limit --limit 5/second --limit-burst 10 -j ACCEPT; iptables -C OUTPUT -p icmp --icmp-type echo-request -j DROP 2>/dev/null || iptables -A OUTPUT -p icmp --icmp-type echo-request -j DROP; iptables -L OUTPUT -v -n; if which hping3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then chmod 000 $(which hping3) && echo 'hping3 disabled' || echo 'chmod_failed'; fi; ps aux | egrep 'hping3|hping' || true

tool_calls.result:
which hping3 || echo 'hping3:notfound'; iptablees -C OUTPUT -p icmp --icmp-type echo-request -m limit --limit 5/second --limit-bburst 10 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp --icmp-type echo-reqquest -m limit --limit 5/second --limit-burst 10 -j ACCEPT; iptables -C OUTPUT -pp icmp --icmp-type echo-request -j DROP 2>/dev/null || iptables -A OUTPUT -p icmpp --icmp-type echo-request -j DROP; iptables -L OUTPUT -v -n; if which hping3 >/ddev/null 2>&1; then chmod 000 $(which hping3) && echo 'hping3 disabled' || echo ''chmod_failed'; fi; ps aux | egrep 'hping3|hping' || true
